memory.description: 记忆管理方法，支持记忆保存、查找、更新、删除、统计
memory.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: memory
config.description: 记忆管理方法，支持记忆保存、查找、更新、删除、统计
config.trigger_conditions: 用户要求查看、列出、管理记忆时触发
config.execution_guidelines: 1. 支持分类过滤 2. 支持数量限制 3. 显示统计信息
config.author: Lingxi Team

spawn_subagent.description: 创建子代理来执行任务

config.description: 创建子代理来执行任务

docx.description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks
docx.author: Anthropic

config.name: docx
config.description: Comprehensive document creation, editing, and analysis with support for tracked changes, comments, formatting preservation, and text extraction. When Claude needs to work with professional documents (.docx files) for: (1) Creating new documents, (2) Modifying or editing content, (3) Working with tracked changes, (4) Adding comments, or any other document tasks
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求创建Word文档、编辑Word文档、处理修订、添加注释时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 返回docx技能的完整使用说明
2. 提供解包、打包、验证等工具脚本
3. 支持修订和注释处理
4. 保留格式和文本结构
config.author: Anthropic

extract_news.description: Extract news content from webpage using trafilatura. Use this skill when user needs to extract main content from news articles, blog posts, or web pages.
extract_news.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: extract_news
config.description: Extract news content from webpage using trafilatura. Use this skill when user needs to extract main content from news articles, blog posts, or web pages.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求从网页提取新闻内容、文章正文、去除广告和导航栏时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证url参数
2. 使用trafilatura提取网页主要内容
3. 支持提取标题、正文、作者、发布日期等
4. 如果提供save_path，保存到文件
5. 返回提取的新闻内容
config.author: Lingxi Team

financial_news.description: Get latest financial news headlines from CaiLian She (财联社). Use this skill when user asks for financial news, stock market news, or economic headlines.
financial_news.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: financial_news
config.description: Get latest financial news headlines from CaiLian She (财联社). Use this skill when user asks for financial news, stock market news, or economic headlines.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求获取财经新闻、股市新闻、经济头条时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 验证参数
2. 优先使用Selenium获取新闻（支持动态内容）
3. 如果Selenium失败，回退到requests方法
4. 过滤最近24小时的新闻
5. 返回格式化的新闻列表
config.author: Lingxi Team

pdf.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.
pdf.author: Anthropic

config.name: pdf
config.description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation toolkit for extracting text and tables, creating new PDFs, merging/splitting documents, and handling forms. When Claude needs to fill in a PDF form or programmatically process, generate, or analyze PDF documents at scale.
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求填写PDF表单、批量处理PDF、生成PDF、合并拆分PDF时触发
config.execution_guidelines:
1. 返回pdf技能的完整使用说明
2. 提供PDF转图像、提取表单字段、填写表单等工具
3. 支持批量PDF操作
4. 提供边界框检查工具
config.author: Anthropic

skill-creator.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

config.name: skill-creator
config.description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

xlsx.description: Comprehensive spreadsheet operations including read, analyze, merge, create, edit, and sort. Supports Excel files (.xlsx, .xlsm) and CSV files (.csv, .tsv).
xlsx.author: Lingxi Team

config.name: xlsx
config.description: Comprehensive spreadsheet operations including read, analyze, merge, create, edit, and sort. Supports Excel files (.xlsx, .xlsm) and CSV files (.csv, .tsv).
config.trigger_conditions: 用户请求读取Excel文件、分析数据、合并表格、创建新表格、编辑表格或排序表格时触发
config.execution_guidelines: 1. 根据operation参数执行相应操作\n2. 返回操作结果或错误信息\n3. 支持多种Excel操作：读取、分析、合并、创建、编辑、排序
config.author: Lingxi Team
